ticket.subject: Re: deen square integration - Emirates Post
ticket.raw_subject: Re: deen square integration - Emirates Post
ticket.description:
Hi Arshad, 

Thank you for looping me in. 

Hi Ashitha, 

Hope you are doing well. 

I’m Abhilash, and I manage Partnerships at PluginHive. 

I would like to get in touch with you over a quick call to discuss the integration process, API documentation, API credentials, and the future scope in more detail, and also understand the next steps before taking this forward. 

Please let me know a convenient time for a short discussion this week. 

Looking forward to connecting with you.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn <https://www.linkedin.com/company/Pluginhive>

Hi Arshad,



Thank you for looping me in.



Hi Ashitha,



Hope you are doing well.



I’m Abhilash, and I manage Partnerships at PluginHive.



I would like to get in touch with you over a quick call to discuss the integration process, API documentation, API credentials, and the future scope in more detail, and also understand the next steps before taking this forward.



Please let me know a convenient time for a short discussion this week.



Looking forward to connecting with you.


Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

comments.html_body:
Hi Arshad, 

Thank you for looping me in. 

Hi Ashitha, 

Hope you are doing well. 

I’m Abhilash, and I manage Partnerships at PluginHive. 

I would like to get in touch with you over a quick call to discuss the integration process, API documentation, API credentials, and the future scope in more detail, and also understand the next steps before taking this forward. 

Please let me know a convenient time for a short discussion this week. 

Looking forward to connecting with you.

Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

On 25 May 2026, at 3:22 PM, Arshad Shaikh <arshad@deensquare.com> wrote:

Hi Ashitha

Abhilash from pluginhive will coordinate with you for integration

Regards 

Arshad 




---- On Mon, 25 May 2026 12:53:55 +0400 Ashitha Kudumbathara <ashitha.kudumbathara@emx.ae> wrote ----

Dear @Arshad Shaikh
 
For the Calculate Rate API, please use Basic Authentication by passing the provided username and password in the request header for staging.
C177122
C177122
 
International
curl --location 'https://osbstg-new.epservices.ae/ebs/genericapi/ratecalculator/rest/CalculatePriceRate' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--header 'AccountNo: C177122' \
--header 'Password: C177122' \
--data '{
    "RateCalculationRequest": {
        "ShipmentType": "Premium",
        "ServiceType": "International",
        "OriginState": "",
        "OriginCity": 3,
        "DestinationCountry": 176,
        "DestinationState": "Lisboa",
        "DestinationCity": "Torres Vedras",
        "Length": 1,
        "Width": 1,
        "Height": 1,
        "Weight": 1050,
        "CalculationCurrencyCode": "AED",
        "ContentTypeCode": "NonDocument",
        "DimensionUnit": "Centimetre",
        "WeightUnit": "Grams",
        "IsRegistered": "No",
        "ProductCode": "PRO-26"
    }
}
' 
Domestic
curl --location 'https://osbstg-new.epservices.ae/ebs/genericapi/ratecalculator/rest/CalculatePriceRate' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
--header 'AccountNo: C177122' \
--header 'Password: C177122' \
--data '{
    "RateCalculationRequest": {
        "ShipmentType": "Express",
        "ServiceType": "Domestic",
        "ContentTypeCode": "Document",
        "OriginState": null,
        "OriginCity": "1",
        "DestinationCountry": "971",
        "DestinationState": null,
        "DestinationCity": "4",
        "Height": 32,
        "Width": 24,
        "Length": 10,
        "DimensionUnit": "Meter",
        "Weight": "500",
        "WeightUnit": "Grams",
        "CalculationCurrencyCode": "AED",
        "IsRegistered": "No",
        "ProductCode": "EPG-21"
    }
}
'
We consider the origin and destination cities for calculating the rates of domestic shipments. The list of cities can be retrieved through the API mentioned below.
https://masters.epservices.ae/locations/api/Emirates
 
For international shipments, only the country ID is used for rate calculation, and this can also be retrieved from the API provided.
https://osb.epservices.ae/ebs/genericapi/lookups/rest/GetCountries
 
Regards,
Ashitha Kishore
 
From: Arshad Shaikh <arshad@deensquare.com> 
Sent: Monday, 25 May 2026 12:35 PM
To: Risha Kumar <risha.kumar@emx.ae>; Ashitha Kudumbathara <ashitha.kudumbathara@emx.ae>
Subject: Re:deen square integration
 

Caution: [EXTERNAL] Do not click on links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender and know the content is safe.
 
Dear Ashitha
 
Please forward the API documentation for Integration
 
Regards
Arshad
 
 
 
From: Risha Kumar <risha.kumar@emx.ae>
To: "Ashitha Kudumbathara"<ashitha.kudumbathara@emx.ae>, "Arshad Shaikh"<arshad@deensquare.com>
Date: Fri, 22 May 2026 09:35:22 +0400
Subject: deen square integration
 
 
________________________________________________________________________________
Microsoft Teams meeting
Join: https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/375806385946660?p=Y3bW283KR4tznpZDvw
Meeting ID: 375 806 385 946 660
Passcode: ys94hG2y

 
Need help? | System reference
Dial in by phone
+971 600 575990,,285091468# United Arab Emirates, All locations
Find a local number
Phone conference ID: 285 091 468#
For organizers: Meeting options | Reset dial-in PIN
 
 
________________________________________________________________________________

comments.body:
Hi Ashitha,



Thank you for your email.



**9:****00 AM to 11:45 AM Dubai time on Tuesday works for us**. Please feel free to send over the meeting invite, and we'll be happy to join.



Alternatively, if you prefer, I would be happy to send the meeting invite from my end. Please let me know what works best for you.



We look forward to speaking with you.



Best Regards,

Abhilash S | Digital Marketing & Partnerships
Connect with us on LinkedIn

Hello Risha,

Thank you for the update. We have noted that the domestic mapping has been re-confirmed with the same Site ID and Product code, with Keerthi's verification. This is helpful for our technical team as they proceed with the integration.

Our development team has received the full API documentation, staging credentials, product codes, and the Postman collection shared by Ashitha (covering Domestic Shipment Creation, International Shipment Creation, Tracking, and the Countries lookup). The integration is currently in active development.

We are working on confirming an estimated timeline and will share it with you and the Emirates Post team as soon as it is available.

Please feel free to reach out if there are any further updates or changes on the carrier side in the meantime.

Thanks & Regards,
Team PluginHive

We have reviewed the integration requirements internally, and our development team has provided an **ETA of 30 June 2026** **(Tuesday)** **for completing the Emirates Post integration. **



Our team has already begun the implementation based on the API documentation, staging credentials, product codes, and Postman collection shared by Ashitha. We will continue to keep you updated on the progress as we move forward.



Please feel free to reach out if there are any further updates or changes on the carrier side in the meantime.

comments.body:
🤖 Auto-generated draft — customer reply (probation mode)
Product: shopify-mcsl | Signal: form_field | Confidence: HIGH | Context: 20 message(s)
─────────────────────────────────────────────

Hello Abhilash,

Thank you for proactively sharing the June 30, 2026 ETA with the Emirates Post team — that is noted and appreciated.

We have also seen Risha's update from earlier today confirming that the domestic mapping has been set up again with the same Site ID and Product code. That is a positive step and aligns well with the integration work already in progress.

For reference, the Postman collection covers the three core integration areas our team is working with: domestic shipment creation, international shipment creation, and the tracking API — all against the staging environment. This gives the development team a solid foundation to complete the implementation by the target date.

We will continue to monitor progress and coordinate between the teams. Please do flag any changes on the carrier side before June 30 so we can factor them in without delay.

Thanks & Regards,
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Arshad,

Following up on the previous communication, we have now received an updated timeline. Based on the latest information, we expect the integration to be available by the **third week of July**.

During the course of development, certain unforeseen circumstances resulted in a slight revision to the original timeline. Our team is actively working to ensure the integration is completed and made available within the updated schedule.

We sincerely apologize for the delay and any inconvenience this may have caused. We truly appreciate your patience and understanding, and we'll continue to keep you informed of any further updates.

Best regards,
Priyanka
PluginHive
